main.description: Find posts matching a search query or filters, returning search hits for matching post records.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.

query.description: Search query string. A query or at least one filter is required.

sort.description: Ranking order for results. 'recent' sorts by recency; 'top' uses search ranking.

authors.description: Include posts by any of these authors. Handles are resolved to DIDs before searching.

mentions.description: Include posts that mention any of these accounts. Handles are resolved to DIDs before searching.

domains.description: Include posts that link to any of these domains.

urls.description: Include posts that link to any of these URLs.

embeddedAtUris.description: Include posts that embed any of these AT URIs.

hashtags.description: Include posts tagged with any of these hashtags. Do not include the hash (#) prefix.

excludeAuthors.description: Exclude posts by any of these authors. Handles are resolved to DIDs before searching.

excludeMentions.description: Exclude posts that mention any of these accounts. Handles are resolved to DIDs before searching.

excludeDomains.description: Exclude posts that link to any of these domains.

excludeUrls.description: Exclude posts that link to any of these URLs.

excludeEmbeddedAtUris.description: Exclude posts that embed any of these AT URIs.

excludeHashtags.description: Exclude posts tagged with any of these hashtags. Do not include the hash (#) prefix.

since.description: Include posts indexed at or after this timestamp. Can be a datetime, or just an ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD).

until.description: Include posts indexed before this timestamp. Defaults to the current time. Can be a datetime, or just an ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD).

allTime.description: Search the full index instead of the recent-post window.

languages.description: Include posts whose language matches any of these language codes.

excludeLanguages.description: Exclude posts whose language matches any of these language codes.

replyParentUri.description: Include only direct replies to this parent post URI.

threadRootUri.description: Include only posts in the thread rooted at this post URI.

excludeReplies.description: Exclude replies from results. Mutually exclusive with repliesOnly.

repliesOnly.description: Include only replies. Mutually exclusive with excludeReplies.

following.description: Include only posts from accounts followed by the viewer.

queryLanguage.description: Language analyzer hint for the query text. If unset, the server auto-detects when possible.

cursor.description: Cursor for the next page of results.

hitsTotal.description: Estimated total number of matching hits. May be rounded or truncated.

detectedQueryLanguages.description: Query languages detected for CJK, Thai, or Arabic text. Empty or omitted for other scripts.
